name: Banana-Rhubarb Muffins
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup chopped fresh rhubarb or frozen rhubarb, thawed and well drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Spray the bottoms of a 12-muffin pan with vegetable cooking spray or line it with paper baking cups.
3. In a medium-sized bowl, beat egg whites with a fork. Stir in milk and oil.
4. Add remaining ingredients except rhubarb, mixing just until flour is moistened (the batter will be lumpy).
5. Fold in rhubarb.
6. Divide the batter among the prepared muffin cups, filling each to the top.
7. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Immediately remove muffins from the pan and cool on wire racks.
